query: 2026 gubernatorial debates scheduled summer 2026 Pennsylvania Shapiro Garrity, Oregon Kotek Drazan, Arizona Hobbs, Wisconsin - any debate before September 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings:

**No general-election gubernatorial debate is scheduled before September 2026 in any of the four states (PA, OR, AZ, WI).**

- **Pennsylvania (Shapiro vs. Garrity):** Both willing to debate "at least once," but nothing scheduled as of June 2026. Garrity called for 7 debates. No summer debate proposed. Would be the first PA gov debate since 2018.

- **Oregon (Kotek vs. Drazan):** Kotek's campaign (~June 11) proposed three televised debates (Portland, Eugene, Medford), with the **first round proposed for September** — not summer. On June 18, Kotek **explicitly declined a summer newspaper-group debate**, citing a busy summer calendar.

- **Arizona (Hobbs vs. TBD):** Primary is **July 21, 2026**, so the general matchup isn't even set before then. Clean Elections general debates are traditionally held in October; Hobbs had not committed to any debate as of July 7.

- **Wisconsin (open seat):** Primary is **August 11, 2026**, making a pre-September general-election debate structurally impossible. Only primary debates have occurred.

The earliest *proposed* general-election debate is Oregon's September proposal. Arizona and Wisconsin cannot hold general debates before September due to their late-July and mid-August primaries.

sources.snippet: General Nov 3, 2026; primaries May 19; Kotek (84%) and Drazan (41%) nominated; first OR gov rematch since 1978.

sources.title: Gov. Hobbs criticizes Biggs for avoiding debates while refusing to commit to one herself
sources.snippet: As of July 7, 2026, Hobbs had not committed to any debate; hasn't faced an opponent on stage in nearly a decade.
